dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DOKJA, OVER HERE!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Okay, I'm going to open it.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THIS ONE IS BROKEN TOO.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: BUT IT IS STILL THE ONLY ONE WE HAVE A CHANCE AT OPENING.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: 4,700 coins possessed. I could use my coins again and increase my strength this time. But who knows what will happen? Recklessly using my coins so early on could be dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA
dialogue.line: Hyeonseong, use your skill.

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG
dialogue.line: What?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [PERSONAL SKILL CHARACTER PROFILE ACTIVATED]

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG
dialogue.line: By skill, you mean...?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [CHARACTER PROFILE] NAME: HYEONSEONG LEE AGE: 28 SUPPORTING CONSTELLATION: MASTER OF STEEL PERSONAL ATTRIBUTE: SOLDIER WHO TURNED A BLIND EYE TO INJUSTICE (GENERAL) SKILLS: [CAMOUFLAGE LV.2], [PATIENCE LV.2] STIGMA: [GREAT MOUNTAIN PUSH LV.1] OVERALL STATS: [STAMINA LV. 8], [STRENGTH LV. 8] [AGILITY LV. 7], [MANA LV. 5] GENERAL EVALUATION: HYEONSEONG LEE HAS VERY GOOD OVERALL STATS. ALTHOUGH HOW READILY HE TURNED A BLIND EYE TO INJUSTICE WAS SURPRISING, A CONSTELLATION STILL SELECTED HIM. THIS IS ANOTHER OPPORTUNITY FOR HIM.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Thankfully, his supporting constellation and attribute are the same as the novel.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA
dialogue.line: You probably checked your skills when you opened your attributes window earlier. You're in the army, so there must be a skill you can use right now.

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG
dialogue.line: Well... I do have one, but I don't know how to use it.

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA
dialogue.line: Just imagine yourself using it.

dialogue.speaker: HYEONSEONG
dialogue.line: That is all it takes?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It worked! It really worked!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [HYEONSEONG LEE HAS BEGUN TO TRUST YOU]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOUR UNDERSTANDING OF HYEONSEONG LEE HAS INCREASED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Looks like the stigma, [GREAT MOUNTAIN PUSH], successfully activated. He's so simple-minded.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The steel door connected to subway cabin 3707 will break soon. Run!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But if my memory serves me right... the steel door isn't the problem.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Gosh, I knew this would happen!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I told you earlier... to stay put!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Damn it! I'm not done preparing the next scenario!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ahh! I knew it! I told you we should stay inside! M-My head!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Sigh... Well, I guess I have no choice.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You're very lucky human beings.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [THE SECOND SCENARIO HAS ARRIVED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: <SUB SCENARIO ESCAPE> CATEGORY: SUB DIFFICULTY: E CLEAR CONDITIONS: GET ACROSS THE COLLAPSED BRIDGE AND ENTER OKSU STATION. TIME LIMIT: 20 MINUTES REWARD: 200 COINS PENALTY FOR FAILURE: ???

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I knew it.

dialogue.speaker: SANGAH
dialogue.line: Dokja, something doesn't feel right. It says 'collapsed bridge,' but the bridge isn't...

dialogue.speaker: DOKJA
dialogue.line: Don't worry about it and just run! Hurry!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Sangah is right. The bridge is still intact because we got off the train too early. In other words, the bridge definitely will collapse. Current Location: Oksu Station.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: It might seem underhanded, but it is impossible to clear this scenario without going around the rules.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: We're cutting it close, but I think we'll make it!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ah! What the hell is that?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It is an Ichthyosaur! No, a Sea Serpent! Or maybe a Sea Commander from... its size?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I-It is coming! The bridge is going to collapse!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Run? We can make it across if we run!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Ichthyosaur doesn't go after incarnations early on in the story. It probably showed up to destroy the bridge.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: We only have about 200 yards left!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: At this speed, we'll be able to cross the bridge before it collapses!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: It is no fun if the game is too easy, is it?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Oh no...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: What's the fun in you getting away safely? Let's shake things up a bit!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [THE DIFFICULTY OF THE SCENARIO HAS BEEN ADJUSTED] DIFFICULTY: E -> D

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [THE EVIL THOUGHTS OF THE DEAD HAVE RETURNED]

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [BLACK ETHER IS RISING FROM THE SURROUNDING EARTH]

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Huh? Z-Zombies?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [DEMONIC BEINGS HAVE BEEN RESURRECTED!]

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Ahh! Y-You bastards!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Dokja!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: [YOU HAVE ENTERED OKSU STATION]

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Damn it! Everyone get down!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Dokja!

summary: The group attempts to open a subway door, with Dokja guiding Hyeonseong to use his skill to break it. They escape the train car just as a new scenario begins, requiring them to cross a collapsing bridge to Oksu Station. However, a mysterious entity intervenes, raising zombies and increasing the scenario's difficulty, forcing them to fight their way into the station.
